_doc: ONE generic, object-agnostic placement manifest (docs/OBJECT_PLACEMENT.md). One entry per object; the engine scripts/place_objects.py is the same for a hangar, church, tower, or autogen box. front.model_groups = substrings of c3d object names that define the FRONT face (the model self-cue that resolves the 180 ambiguity); front.world = how the world says the front should point ('apron'|'road'|<azimuth deg>).

front._note: the +X facade (FRONT/DOORS groups) faces the airfield ~30deg NE; this resolves the 180. For a symmetric/autogen box, omit -> the 180 is irrelevant.
